requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety, EMC, and Grid Compatibility — 220 V / 380 V at 60 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全、电磁兼容与电网兼容——220 V / 380 V、60 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全、電磁相容與電網相容——220 V / 380 V、60 Hz

summary.en: South Korea uses 220 V single-phase residential supply and 380 V three-phase commercial supply at 60 Hz. Heat-pump HVAC products must demonstrate electrical safety and grid compatibility for these Korean conditions, and EMC obligations may involve MSIT / KCC rules in addition to KC safety under KATS. KS C IEC standards are adopted for relevant safety testing.
summary.zh: 韩国使用220 V单相住宅供电和380 V三相商业供电，频率为60 Hz。热泵HVAC产品必须证明在这些韩国条件下的电气安全和电网兼容性，电磁兼容义务除KATS下的KC安全外，还可能涉及MSIT / KCC规则。相关安全测试采用KS C IEC标准。
summary.zht: 韓國使用220 V單相住宅供電和380 V三相商業供電，頻率為60 Hz。熱泵HVAC產品必須證明在這些韓國條件下的電氣安全和電網相容性，電磁相容義務除KATS下的KC安全外，還可能涉及MSIT / KCC規則。相關安全測試採用KS C IEC標準。

standards_or_laws: South Korea 220 V / 380 V, 60 Hz grid conditions

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 25454 and GB/T 7725 for efficiency and performance, CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW, and GB 9237 as a refrigerant safety baseline. China-market electrical evidence generally reflects 50 Hz product design and does not by itself prove South Korea 60 Hz safety, EMC, compressor, inverter, or control compatibility.
summary.zh: 中国通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作为能效和性能依据，对适用的40 kW及以下热泵实施CCC强制认证，并以GB 9237作为制冷剂安全基线。中国市场电气证据通常反映50 Hz产品设计，本身不能证明韩国60 Hz安全、电磁兼容、压缩机、变频器或控制兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國通常以GB 25454和GB/T 7725作為能效和性能依據，對適用的40 kW及以下熱泵實施CCC強制認證，並以GB 9237作為制冷劑安全基線。中國市場電氣證據通常反映50 Hz產品設計，本身不能證明韓國60 Hz安全、電磁相容、壓縮機、變頻器或控制相容性。

standards_or_laws: CCC mandatory certification for applicable heat pumps up to 40 kW

gap.en: This is a critical design gap. Residential nominal voltage is similar to China at 220 V, but South Korea is 60 Hz, so China 50 Hz heat pumps should be treated as incompatible until the compressor, motors, inverter drive, protection devices, thermal performance, EMC, noise, and marking package are validated for Korea.
gap.zh: 这是关键设计差距。住宅标称电压与中国同为220 V，但韩国为60 Hz，因此中国50 Hz热泵在压缩机、电机、变频驱动、保护装置、热性能、电磁兼容、噪声和标识资料完成韩国验证前，应视为不兼容。
gap.zht: 這是關鍵設計差距。住宅標稱電壓與中國同為220 V，但韓國為60 Hz，因此中國50 Hz熱泵在壓縮機、電機、變頻驅動、保護裝置、熱性能、電磁相容、噪聲和標識資料完成韓國驗證前，應視為不相容。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Korean KC safety, EMC, installation, and energy-performance evidence where electrical supply conditions affect compliance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable CCC and China GB evidence; not equivalent to Korean 60 Hz safety and EMC validation

source.publisher: National Radio Research Agency / MSIT, Republic of Korea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Critical gap — South Korea 60 Hz electrical compatibility and EMC evidence must be validated separately; China 50 Hz heat pumps are not directly compatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 关键差距——韩国60 Hz电气兼容和电磁兼容证据必须单独验证；中国50 Hz热泵不能直接兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 關鍵差距——韓國60 Hz電氣相容和電磁相容證據必須單獨驗證；中國50 Hz熱泵不能直接相容。
